zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Emmote Whetehill於1461年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯時，她的父親Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight51歲，母親Joan Marrow33歲。她和John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1521年5月31日在英國英格蘭爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Emmote Whetehill于1461年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯时，她的父亲Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight51岁，母亲Joan Marrow33岁。她和John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1521年5月31日在英国英格兰爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Whetehill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire, Bute, and Lanarkshire) and English (Lancashire): habitational name from any of various minor places called Whitehill, in Scotland, northern England, and elsewhere.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Emmote
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Emmett  .

variants.name: Emmett
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, itself derived from the medieval female given name Emmet or Em(m)ot, diminutive forms of Emma . It may sometimes be used by parents with Irish connections, in honour of the rebel Robert Emmet ( 1778–1803 ), who led a disastrous attempt at rebellion against the English.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Emmote Whetehill was born in 1461, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight, was 51 and her mother, Joan Marrow, was 33. She had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer. She died on 31 May 1521, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Emmote Whetehill est née en 1461, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Joan Marrow, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer. Elle est décédée le 31 mai 1521, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Emmote Whetehill 1461 in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight 51 und ihre Mutter Joan Marrow 33. Sie hatte mit John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Mai 1521 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Emmote Whetehill è nata il nel 1461 nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Joan Marrow, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer. Morì il 31 maggio 1521, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Emmote Whetehillが1461年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Whetehill, Knightは51歳，母Joan Marrowは33歳であった。彼女はJohn Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimerとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1521年5月31日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Emmote Whetehill(이)가 1461년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Marrow(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1521년 5월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Emmote Whetehill nasceu em 1461, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Joan Marrow, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer. Ela faleceu em 31 de maio de 1521, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Emmote Whetehill родилась в 1461 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Marrow, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer. Она умерла 31 мая 1521 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Emmote Whetehill nació en 1461, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Joan Marrow, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas con John Richard Griffin 9th Lord Latimer. Murió el 31 de mayo de 1521, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
